intro: A psychological horror experience where isolation is your greatest enemy. Explore abandoned asylum, uncover disturbing secrets.
description: Trapped within a decaying asylum consumed by darkness and despair, you must uncover the horrifying truth hidden behind its abandoned halls. In this psychological horror experience, isolation becomes your greatest enemy as disturbing echoes, twisted visions, and unseen threats blur the line between reality and madness. Explore oppressive environments, solve unsettling mysteries, and survive terrifying encounters where every sound could be your last. The deeper you descend into the asylum, the more the past refuses to stay buried.
